old_value: {"id":"ifc-cli-0yx","title":"Epic 1: STEP Lexer \u0026 Entity Parser","description":"Parse any STEP/IFC file and produce a stream of Entity structs. No IFC knowledge, no database, just parsing. Deliverable: ifc-to-db parse --dry-run prints entity count, type histogram, and parse duration.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:44Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:44Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-am9","title":"Epic 6: CLI Polish \u0026 Distribution","description":"Production-ready CLI with comprehensive machine-readable help, structured output, proper error handling, and cross-platform builds. Deliverable: downloadable binaries, --help-json for agent discovery, --output-format json on all commands.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:15Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:15Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-rug","title":"1.1: Project scaffolding","description":"Initialize Go module (ifc-to-db), set up directory structure (cmd/, internal/step/, internal/db/, internal/extract/, internal/ifc/, internal/cli/), configure Makefile with build/test/lint/bench targets, add .golangci-lint.yml","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:50Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:50Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-9ri","title":"1.2: Token definitions and lexer skeleton","description":"Define TokenKind enum and Token struct, implement Lexer struct wrapping []byte with cursor, implement NextToken() (Token, error), handle comment blocks (/* ... */)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:52Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:52Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-29r","title":"6.1: CLI framework and command structure","description":"Use cobra (github.com/spf13/cobra) as CLI framework. Root command: ifc-to-db. Subcommands: import, info, query, schema, version. Every command must support --help.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:20Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:20Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-a2l","title":"1.3: Lexer numeric literals","description":"Integer parsing (optional sign, digit sequence), float parsing (decimal point and/or exponent E/e), edge case: distinguish negative numbers from other uses of -","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:54Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:54Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-0xn","title":"1.4: Lexer string literals","description":"Single-quote delimited strings, escaped quotes via '', multi-line string support, raw byte preservation (defer IFC encoding to later step)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:55Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:55Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-trr","title":"1.6: Lexer remaining token types","description":"Entity IDs and refs (#digits), type names (uppercase+digits+underscores), enum values (.ELEMENT., .T., .F.), structural tokens ( ) , ; =, special values $ (null) and * (derived)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:01Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:01Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-5x4","title":"1.7: Whitespace and header handling","description":"Skip whitespace between tokens, handle STEP header section (ISO-10303-21;, HEADER;, ENDSEC;, DATA;, END-ISO-10303-21;), extract header metadata (file description, file name, file schema)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:04Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:04Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7ua","title":"6.2: Import command flags","description":"Flags: -o/--output, --memory, --skip-properties, --skip-geometry, --skip-relationships, --skip-quantities, --only, --append, --batch-size, -q/--quiet, -v/--verbose, --log-file, --output-format. Each flag must document purpose, default, valid values/range, and example.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:22Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:22Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-0es","title":"6.3: Info command flags","description":"--output-format (text/json). JSON schema: schema_version, originating_application, entity_count, type_histogram, file_size_bytes, has_properties, has_geometry. For pre-inspection before full import.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:25Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:25Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7d9","title":"6.4: Query command flags","description":"--output-format (table/csv/json/jsonl), --header/--no-header, --null-value. Accept SQL as positional arg or via --file. Exit codes: 0=success, 1=SQL error, 2=connection error.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:26Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:26Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-ctv","title":"6.5: Schema command","description":"ifc-to-db schema prints full DDL. --table prints DDL for specific table. --tables lists table names. --columns lists columns with name/type/description. --output-format json for full schema as JSON. Critical for agent discoverability.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:29Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:29Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-mgj","title":"6.8: Structured output for agent consumption","description":"--output-format json on import emits summary object: status, input_file, output_file, schema_version, duration_ms, entities_parsed, entities_errored, tables_populated, row_counts, phases, warnings, errors. All errors to stderr, structured output to stdout.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:36Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:36Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-kj9","title":"6.9: Error handling hardening","description":"Structured error types with context (file position, entity ID, phase). Graceful degradation: log and continue on per-element failures. Summary report at end. JSON error format when --output-format json.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:38Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:38Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-xpl","title":"6.10: Logging (slog)","description":"Structured logging with slog (Go 1.21+). Levels: error/warn/info/debug. --log-file option. JSON log entries when --output-format json.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:40Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:40Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7kp","title":"1.5: IFC string decoding","description":"Implement \\S\\ (ISO 8859 shift), \\X\\ (single hex byte), \\X2\\...\\X0\\ (UCS-2 hex), \\X4\\...\\X0\\ (UCS-4 hex), \\\\\\\\ (literal backslash). Unit tests with known encoded strings from real IFC files.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:58Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:42:58Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-y0h","title":"1.8: Entity parser","description":"Parse statement pattern: #ID = TYPENAME(attr, attr, ...);, build StepValue tree for attribute lists (recursive for nested lists and typed values), handle typed values like IFCLENGTHMEASURE(2.5), handle empty lists () and entity refs in attributes","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:07Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:07Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-56z","title":"6.12: Cross-platform builds (CI)","description":"GitHub Actions CI: Linux amd64/arm64, macOS amd64/arm64, Windows amd64. DuckDB static linking per platform. Release archives with checksums.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:43Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:43Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-42j","title":"1.9: Entity parser error handling","description":"Report errors with byte offset and line number, on malformed entity: log warning, skip to next semicolon, continue parsing, track statistics: total entities parsed, errors encountered, entities by type","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:09Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:09Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7oy","title":"1.10: Stream interface","description":"Implement Parser struct with Next() (*Entity, error) method, return io.EOF at end of data section, zero-copy where possible using byte slices referencing memory-mapped source","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:11Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:11Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-jka","title":"1.11: Testing and validation","description":"Unit tests for each token type, unit tests for nested attribute lists/typed values/edge cases, integration test: parse minimal IFC file verify entity count and types, integration test: parse real-world IFC file, fuzz testing on lexer with go test -fuzz","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:13Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:13Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-ygu","title":"1.12: Performance baseline","description":"Benchmark: parse 100 MB IFC file measure time and memory, profile with pprof identify allocation hotspots, implement string interning for type names (~800 distinct IFC types), target: 100 MB/s parsing throughput","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:15Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:15Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-6t9","title":"2.1: DuckDB integration setup","description":"Add go-duckdb dependency, implement db.Open(path) that creates/opens DuckDB file, run schema DDL on first open (create all tables if not exist), handle CGO build configuration in Makefile","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:07Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:07Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-m7u","title":"Epic 2: DuckDB Writer \u0026 Raw Entity Import","description":"Write parsed entities into a DuckDB database, populating the entities table and file_metadata. Deliverable: ifc-to-db import file.ifc -o output.duckdb creates a database with populated entities and file_metadata tables.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:01Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:01Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-8df","title":"2.2: Batch writer using Appender API","description":"Implement Writer struct wrapping DuckDB appender for entities table, batch size configuration (default 10000 entities per flush), automatic flush on batch size threshold and on close","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:09Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:09Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-8j4","title":"2.3: JSON serialization of StepValue","description":"Define JSON representation: KindString-\u003estring, KindInteger-\u003enumber, KindFloat-\u003enumber, KindEnum-\u003e{enum:X}, KindRef-\u003e{ref:N}, KindList-\u003earray, KindTyped-\u003e{type:T,value:V}, KindNull-\u003enull, KindDerived-\u003e{derived:true}. Benchmark json.Marshal vs manual byte-buffer.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:12Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:12Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-1ix","title":"2.4: File metadata extraction","description":"Parse STEP header for FILE_DESCRIPTION, FILE_NAME, FILE_SCHEMA. Record source filename, file size, schema identifier (e.g. IFC4), originating application, parse timing, entity count. Write to file_metadata table as key-value pairs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:15Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:15Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-n5d","title":"2.5: Progress reporting","description":"Byte-offset-based progress (percentage), entity count and parse rate (entities/sec, MB/s), --quiet flag to suppress, --json-progress for machine-readable output","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:17Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:17Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-qcg","title":"2.6: End-to-end pipeline","description":"Wire lexer -\u003e parser -\u003e writer in CLI command, memory-map input file using mmap, handle graceful shutdown (SIGINT) - flush pending batch, close database cleanly","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:19Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:19Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-dpz","title":"2.7: Import testing","description":"Test: parse and import small IFC, verify entity count in DB matches. Test: JSON roundtrip with DuckDB JSON functions. Test: multiple imports (replace vs --append). Benchmark: import 100 MB file measuring total time including DB writes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:21Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:21Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-e35","title":"Epic 3: Property Set Denormalization","description":"Extract all property sets and quantity sets from raw entity table into flat, queryable tables. Deliverable: SELECT * FROM properties WHERE prop_name = 'FireRating' returns all elements with fire rating data.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:20Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:20Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-by7","title":"Epic 4: Relationship \u0026 Spatial Hierarchy","description":"Populate relationships table with all IFCREL* entity connections and build spatial hierarchy tree. Deliverable: SELECT * FROM spatial_structure WHERE parent_type = 'IFCBUILDINGSTOREY' returns all elements on a given floor.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:34Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:34Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-glf","title":"Epic 5: Geometry Serialization","description":"Serialize each element's geometry representation and placement as JSON blobs for later computation. Deliverable: SELECT element_id, representation_type FROM geometry WHERE representation_type = 'SweptSolid' returns elements with full geometry JSON trees.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:45Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:45Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-73c","title":"IFCRELDEFINESBYPROPERTIES resolver","description":"Query entities for ifc_type=IFCRELDEFINESBYPROPERTIES, extract related element refs (attr pos 4) and property set ref (attr pos 5), build in-memory map: propertySetID -\u003e []elementID","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:27Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:27Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-41e","title":"Generic IFCREL* extraction","description":"Identify all entity types starting with IFCREL in raw entities, create config map of rel types to source/target attribute positions (IFCRELAGGREGATES pos 4-\u003e5, IFCRELCONTAINEDINSPATIALSTRUCTURE pos 4-\u003e5, IFCRELCONNECTSPATHELEMENTS pos 4-\u003e5, IFCRELVOIDSELEMENT pos 4-\u003e5, IFCRELFILLSELEMENT pos 4-\u003e5, IFCRELASSIGNSTASKS, IFCRELASSIGNSTOGROUP). Extract and insert into relationships table.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:42Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:42Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-tx8","title":"5.1: Representation resolver","description":"For each building element, follow Representation attribute to IFCPRODUCTDEFINITIONSHAPE, then to IFCSHAPEREPRESENTATION entries. Identify representation type: SweptSolid, Brep, Tessellation, MappedRepresentation, Clipping, CSG.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:52Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:43:52Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7d1","title":"6.6: Comprehensive help text","description":"Every command --help must include: one-line summary, description paragraph, usage syntax, full flag listing with defaults/types/ranges, 2+ usage examples, exit code docs, related commands. Root --help includes workflow overview.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:31Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:31Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-hsz","title":"6.7: Machine-readable help (--help-json)","description":"ifc-to-db --help-json outputs full CLI structure as JSON: all commands, all flags with metadata (name, short, type, default, description, valid values, required/optional). Primary interface for autonomous agent discovery.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:34Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:34Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-9h4","title":"6.14: CLI testing","description":"E2e test: import real IFC, run expected queries, verify results. Help text tests: every command has examples, every flag has default, --help-json is valid JSON. Output format tests. Exit code tests. Performance regression test.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:48Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:48Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-m09","title":"6.11: Man page and completion generation","description":"Generate man pages from cobra (cobra-doc). Shell completions for bash, zsh, fish, powershell. Flag value completions where applicable.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:42Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:44:42Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-zc1","title":"Implement info command","description":"The info command is a stub that just prints args. Implement it to:
- Accept an IFC file OR a .duckdb file as input
- For IFC files: parse the STEP header to show schema version, originating system, description, and entity count summary (type histogram) without full import
- For DuckDB files: show file_metadata table contents and row counts per table
- Support --output-format text|json (FR-015)
- Use the existing step.NewParser and parser.Metadata() for IFC header parsing
- Use the existing db.Open for DuckDB inspection","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:55Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:55Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7bk","title":"Implement schema command","description":"The schema command is a stub that just prints args. Implement it to:
- No args needed — prints the DDL from db/schema.go
- --tables: list just table names
- --table <name>: print DDL for one table
- --columns <name>: list column names and types for a table
- --output-format text|json (FR-015)
- Parse the DDL constants in db/schema.go or use DuckDB information_schema on a temp db
- Designed for agent discoverability (FR-016)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:59Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:59Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-ob2","title":"Implement query command","description":"The query command is a stub that just prints args. Implement it to:
- Accept <database.duckdb> and SQL as positional args, or --file for SQL from file
- Open the DuckDB file read-only and execute the query
- Output formats: table (aligned columns), csv, json, jsonl (FR-015)
- --header/--no-header for table/csv output
- --null-value for custom NULL display
- Proper error handling: exit code 3 for DB errors, exit code 4 for bad SQL
- Stream results row by row for large result sets","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:46:03Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:46:03Z"}

old_value: {"id":"ifc-cli-9rm","title":"Prompt before replacing existing .duckdb file","description":"When importing and the output .duckdb file already exists, the CLI should print a message and ask y/n before deleting. If user passes --force or -f, skip the prompt and replace silently. If stdin is not a terminal (piped), default to abort with a message suggesting --force.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T11:21:13Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-07T11:21:13Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-73y","title":"Add progress indicators to all post-processing phases","description":"After parsing completes at ~96%, the post-processing phases (properties, relationships, spatial, geometry) run with zero user feedback. Each phase should show a progress indicator: phase name, spinner or elapsed time, and entity/row counts when done. The cache loading step should also indicate progress. Users currently think the tool is stuck after 96%.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T11:21:16Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-07T11:21:16Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-hf2","title":"DuckDB Appender for relationships inserts","description":"Replace tx.Prepare + stmt.Exec with DuckDB Appender API in ExtractRelationships. Convert sql.NullString to *string for nullable context column.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:05Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:05Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-jfj","title":"DuckDB Appender for spatial inserts","description":"Replace tx.Prepare + stmt.Exec with DuckDB Appender API in ExtractSpatialHierarchy. Convert sql.NullString/NullInt64 to pointer types for nullable columns.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:06Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:06Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7vh","title":"DuckDB Appender for geometry inserts","description":"Replace db.Prepare + insert.Exec with DuckDB Appender API in ExtractGeometry. JSON columns passed as string.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:06Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:06Z"}

{"id":"ifc-cli-7tt","title":"Fix garbled progress output","description":"Progress lines show trailing characters due to shorter replacement text on \\r. Use ANSI erase-to-EOL or pad with spaces.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"jroempp@ambergloglay.com","created_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:07Z","created_by":"johannesmichael","updated_at":"2026-03-08T21:07:07Z"}

new_value: Fixed in commit 722ed5b on feat/gui: moved progress.Finish() before post-processing phases so parse progress line is properly terminated before phase output begins.

old_value: {"id":"ifc-cli-7tm","title":"Split relationships into basic and deep tiers","description":"By default emit only 6 spatial/topological relationship types.
